auth.shell.support_description: Every auth step is designed to protect the workspace, verify inbox ownership, and keep access traceable.
auth.google.error: Could not open Google sign-in right now.
auth.login.title: System Access
auth.login.description: Sign in with a verified inbox and land in the right desk without losing factory context.
auth.login.step_1_detail: Only verified inboxes can open the workspace.
auth.login.step_2_detail: Cookie protection keeps the handoff stable after sign-in.
auth.login.step_3_detail: Role routing finishes the sign-in without another decision screen.
auth.login.create_account_prompt: Need a new workspace access path?
auth.login.rating_detail: Verified inbox ownership, protected cookies, and role-based routing hold the sign-in path steady before the workspace opens.
auth.login.oauth_error: Could not open Google access right now.
auth.login.reset_success: Password updated. Sign in with your new password.
auth.login.backend_waking: Backend wake-up in progress. Hold for a few seconds, then try again.
auth.login.backend_unreachable: Backend not reachable. Check API base URL and backend status.
auth.login.resend_requires_email: Enter the same email first, then resend verification.
auth.login.resend_failed: Could not resend the verification email.
auth.register.title: Create your account
auth.register.description: Public signup creates an attendance-worker signup request that stays locked until the inbox is verified.
auth.register.description_redirect: Create the account, verify the inbox, then continue into {{destination}}.
auth.register.journey_title: Bring workers into the system without risking factory access.
auth.register.journey_description: Collect the details, verify the inbox owner, then unlock the real account.
auth.register.journey_description_redire: The account stays locked until the inbox is verified, then the user can continue into {{destination}}.
auth.register.step_1_detail: Collect the person, factory, and contact details needed to prepare a pending signup safely.
auth.register.step_2_detail: Only the inbox owner can open the verification link and activate the real DPR.ai account.
auth.register.step_3_detail: After verification, the worker returns to sign in and start using the attendance-first workflow.
auth.register.support_description: Wrong or fake emails can no longer create a working account. They only create a pending signup that stays locked until the real inbox verifies it.
auth.register.start_here_detail: After verification, the user can continue into {{destination}}.
auth.register.google_description: Use Google when you want the direct workspace route instead of the attendance-worker signup request.
auth.register.google_hint: Use Google when you want the direct workspace-owner route instead of the attendance-worker signup request.
auth.register.password_hint: Use 12+ characters with mixed case, number, and symbol.
auth.register.error_factory_required: Factory/Company name is required to verify the company code.
auth.register.error_backend_unreachable: Backend not reachable. Check that FastAPI is running and NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL is correct.
auth.register.error_timeout: Signup is taking too long waiting for email delivery. Please try again or retry in a minute.
auth.register.success_pending_detail: The signup request is stored safely. You only need to resend verification after email delivery recovers.
auth.register.success_inbox_detail: The real account stays locked until this inbox opens the verification email and activates the signup.
auth.register.success_link_detail: Preview mode is active, so you can open the verification link directly from this screen.
auth.register.saved_but_retry: Signup saved, but email delivery needs another try
auth.register.check_inbox: Check your inbox to finish signup
auth.register.pending_record_notice: Random or wrong emails can create a pending record, but they do not get working access. Only the person who can open that inbox can activate the account.
auth.register.reset_notice: Password reset works only after verification is complete. Until then, use Resend Verification Email instead of forgot password.
auth.register.local_preview: Local preview mode is active, so your verification link is shown here directly.
auth.register.resend_failed: Could not resend the verification email.
auth.forgot.title: Forgot password
auth.forgot.description: Enter your account email and we will prepare a reset path.
auth.forgot.journey_title: Recover access without leaking account state.
auth.forgot.journey_description: The flow stays privacy-safe and only works for verified, active accounts.
auth.forgot.step_1_detail: Submit the account email. The response stays privacy-safe either way.
auth.forgot.step_2_detail: Use only the latest valid email if multiple links were requested.
auth.forgot.step_3_detail: Choose a strong password, then sign in again with the same email.
auth.forgot.support_description: This screen never confirms whether an email exists. Reset works only after signup verification creates the real account.
auth.forgot.copy_failed: Could not copy automatically. You can still open the link below.
auth.forgot.sent: Reset email sent if the account exists
auth.forgot.help_unverified: If signup email verification is still pending, reset will not arrive until the real account exists.
auth.forgot.help_privacy: For privacy, this page always shows the same result whether the email exists or not.
auth.forgot.check_inbox: Check your inbox, spam, and promotions folder for the reset email.
auth.forgot.resend_requires_email: Enter the same signup email first, then resend verification.
auth.forgot.resend_failed: Could not resend the verification email.
auth.reset.title: Reset password
auth.reset.description: Create a new password, then sign in again with the same email.
auth.reset.journey_title: Turn a one-time link into a clean account reset.
auth.reset.journey_description: The link is temporary and one-time-use. Saving the new password revokes older sessions.
auth.reset.step_1_detail: We first check that the recovery link is still valid.
auth.reset.step_2_detail: Use a fresh password with enough length and complexity.
auth.reset.step_3_detail: After the reset completes, sign in again with the new password only.
auth.reset.support_description: Password reset revokes active refresh sessions so only the new password opens fresh sessions.
auth.reset.missing_token: This reset link is missing a token. Please request a new one.
auth.reset.verify_failed: Could not verify the reset link.
auth.reset.next_step: Next step: use your new password on the sign-in screen. You will be redirected there automatically.
auth.reset.prep: Enter the new password twice, save it once, then return to sign in with the same email.
auth.reset.expiry_notice: This reset link works only once. If it expires, request a new link.
auth.reset.password_guidance: Use 12+ characters with uppercase, lowercase, number, and symbol.
auth.verify.title: Verify email
auth.verify.description: Confirm your email address so the account can sign in securely.
auth.verify.journey_title: Use inbox ownership as the final activation gate.
auth.verify.journey_description: Verification turns a pending signup into a real account or confirms ownership on an existing local account.
auth.verify.step_1_detail: The inbox owner proves they can open the secure verification email.
auth.verify.step_2_detail: Pending signups become real accounts only after the token is redeemed.
auth.verify.step_3_detail: Once verification succeeds, sign in with the same email and password.
auth.verify.support_description: This keeps every activated account tied to a reachable email owner before factory access starts.
auth.verify.missing_token: This verification link is missing a token. Request a new one.
auth.verify.failed: Could not verify the email address.
auth.verify.invalid: Could not verify the email link.
auth.verify.next_step: Next step: return to sign in and use the same email and password from registration.
auth.verify.prep: Confirm this link once, then return to sign in with the same registration email.
